claims.text: ### Reported thermodynamic quantities also present in SRD-46

paragraphs.text:
## Takeaway

| Species | Approximate reported range of logβ |
|---|---:|
| ML | 7.99–8.80 |
| ML2 | 14.69–16.30 |

A simple chemistry read on these numbers: Cu(II) binds glycine **strongly**, and the **bis(glycinato)** complex is substantially favored over the 1:1 complex under comparable conditions. The spread in values reflects changes in **temperature** and especially **ionic strength**, so comparisons should always be made at matched conditions.

**Source:** NIST SRD-46.
